reference_measurements._comment: Replace these with the MRTD/RTMR hashes captured from the first reproducible build. Two independent builders must produce the same hash before this manifest is considered production-ready.

notes: This manifest is the authoritative list of expected measurements for a v0.1.0 production TEE image.
Clients reject any attestation whose MRTD does not appear here.
Two independent builds at the same flake revision must produce identical image_sha256; if they differ, the build is not reproducible and must not be deployed.
